title: BREAKING: US Government BANNED Mythos and Fable
summary: The US government issued an export control directive that forced Anthropic to immediately disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all customers. Better Stack reports this development as breaking news via YouTube.
writeup: This Better Stack video reports as breaking news that the US government issued an export control directive forcing Anthropic to immediately disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all customers. The development matters because an export control action triggering an immediate shutdown of deployed models would affect every customer relying on them. The key takeaway is the directive itself and its consequence: Anthropic disabling both models across its customer base.
